text: Stepping from the quiet hallway into this immersive, luminescent space, I feel curiosity and anticipation building within me. The vibrant colors and swirling light feel almost otherworldly, challenging my sense of place. Words about research, development, and human connection echo against the futuristic ambiance, inviting contemplation about the boundaries between subject and observer. I am present, attentive, and quietly exhilarated, as if on the edge of discovery.
